parameters.query:
SELECT
  q.id, q.created_at, q.status, q.system_type, q.monthly_kwh, q.operator,
  q.dept, q.address, q.kwp, q.num_panels, q.total_cop, q.annual_sav_cop, q.roi_years,
  q.has_excedentes, q.agpe_category, q.coverage_pct, q.shade_index,
  u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.name, u.phone, u.company, u.quote_count
FROM quotes q
JOIN users u ON u.id = q.user_id
WHERE ($1 = '' OR q.status = $1)
  AND ($2 = '' OR LOWER(u.email) LIKE $2 OR LOWER(u.name) LIKE $2)
ORDER BY q.created_at DESC
LIMIT $3;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { ok: true, count: rows.length, quotes: rows } }];
